zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Tilly於大約1356年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Sir John Tilly33歲，母親Elizabeth Northamptonshire29歲。她於大約1377年與John Tame結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Tilly于大约1356年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，她的父亲Sir John Tilly33岁，母亲Elizabeth Northamptonshire29岁。她于大约1377年与John Tame结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Tilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a shortened form of Tilling, which itself is a patronymic from Till .
English and Irish: variant of   Tilley  .

variants.name: Till
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Till, a pet form of Old French Matild(e) (in its Latin form Matilda), which was an alternative to Maud; see Maude 2. A diminutive form occurs in Tillotson .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Tilly was born about 1356, in Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir John Tilly, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth Northamptonshire, was 29. She married John Tame about 1377. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Tilly est née environ 1356, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Tilly, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Northamptonshire, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John Tame environ 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Tilly um 1356 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Tilly 33 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Northamptonshire 29. Sie hat um 1377 John Tame geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Tilly è nata il circa 1356 nel Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Tilly, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Northamptonshire, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato John Tame circa 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Tillyが約1356年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Tillyは33歳，母Elizabeth Northamptonshireは29歳であった。約1377年にJohn Tameと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Tilly(이)가 대략 1356년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Tilly(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Northamptonshire(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1377년 John Tame(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Tilly nasceu aproximadamente 1356, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Tilly, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Northamptonshire, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com John Tame aproximadamente 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Tilly родилась около 1356 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Tilly было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Northamptonshire, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Tame около 1377 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Tilly nació aproximadamente 1356, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Tilly, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Northamptonshire, tenía 29 años. Se casó con John Tame aproximadamente 1377. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en Inglaterra.
